h1.visual_description: Large, all-caps, sans-serif font. Typically includes a chapter number (e.g., 'CHAPTER 1.') followed by the chapter title, underlined by a full-width horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, all-caps, sans-serif, bold font. Used for primary section headers within the body text.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Author name, presented in all-caps sans-serif font, positioned between the chapter title and the first section heading.
Figure caption, set in a smaller, sans-serif, italicized font and centered directly beneath the associated image.
Page footer located at the bottom right, consisting of the document/section title in all-caps followed by the page number.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Narrative citation within text (e.g., referencing specific laws like 'SB1359').

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Recurring footer text at the bottom right margin: 'PRICE TRANSPARENCY [Page Number]'.
